attacking_style: Not an attacker profile. Functions as sprinter/leadout specialist who can hold position in moderate time trials but lacks climbing durability for stage race GC defense.
team_tactics: Primary role as leadout domestique for team leaders (Sagan). When in unexpected GC position, receives minimal team support as squad prioritizes designated leaders (Kelderman).
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling stages and time trials show competence. Exposed on sustained climbs, particularly late in stage races where cumulative fatigue undermines any GC ambitions.
vulnerability: Late-race climbs after minimal team support; physical durability issues (bee sting DNF); loses GC position when team refuses to defend jersey in favor of designated leader.
key_patterns: Operates as leadout/domestique for Bora sprinters, not protected rider (2 instances)
Unexpected TT resilience allows brief GC competitiveness against specialists (1s margin held)
Team abandons his GC defense when conflicts with designated leader strategy (Kelderman priority)
Fades on late climbs, confirming sprinter physiology limits stage race ambitions
form_trajectory: neutral: 2021 showed surprising TT competence but predictable climbing limitations. Role remains domestique, not evolution toward GC contention.
